title: ilex saxicola
intro: Ilex saxicola, also known as the rocky holly or saxicola holly, is a small, shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Aquifoliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which contain a compound called amygdalin, a cyanogenic glycoside that has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ilex saxicola include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the berries are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
